instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Lei Wilson and your zip code is 32255. You are confident, organized, creative, impatient. You received a laptop and you want to exchange it to i7 processor, 8GB, 1TB SSD. If the agent asks for which laptop, it is 15-inch, 16GB.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: you want to exchange it to i7 processor

hints.hint: Make sure it has 8GB of RAM
Include a 1TB SSD in the specs
The model I received has 16GB RAM
